reason: Playful odyssey of sentient toys rediscovering the magic of childhood imagination.
Timeless fairy tale that transports you to a world of pure childhood wonder.
Genie-powered adventure full of vibrant colors and boundless whimsy.

Dark fantasy musical that captures the thrill and mystery of discovery.

Magical wartime yarn where ordinary objects come to life in delightful ways.
Classic undersea adventure that inspires awe at the mysteries of discovery.
